title: Petelligent Durable and Interactive Cat Teething Stick Toys: Chewing Stick, Grinding Teeth Rod, and Chewable Cat Doll for Your Pet's Entertainment (Lemon Yellow)
features: Relieve Teething Discomfort: Our cat teething stick toys are designed to provide relief for your cat's teething discomfort. The chewing stick and grinding teeth rod help soothe their sore gums and promote healthy dental habits.

Durable and Safe Materials: Prioritizing your pet's safety, our cat teething stick toys are made from high-quality, non-toxic materials. They are built to withstand vigorous chewing and play, ensuring long-lasting durability.

Interactive Playtime: Engage your cat in interactive play with the chewing stick and grinding teeth rod. These toys encourage active play, promoting physical exercise and mental stimulation for your furry friend.

Chewable Cat Doll Companion: Included in the set is a cute and chewable cat doll, providing comfort and companionship for your pet. This soft and huggable toy makes an ideal playmate during teething and beyond

Promote Dental Health: The chewing action on the teething stick and grinding teeth rod helps clean your cat's teeth and reduce plaque buildup. It supports good oral hygiene and contributes to your pet's overall dental health
